---
title: "Vidit_LDA_Exercise_WashU"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

## Data Cleaning

```{R}
# Libraries
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(kableExtra)
library(glmnet)
```

```{R}
# Reading the datasets
# Baseline Data
base = read_csv(here("files", "baseline_df.csv"))
# Visits Data
vis = read_csv(here("files", "visits_df.csv"))
# Exits and Death Data
outcome = read_csv(here("files", "outcomes_df.csv"))

# Summary check for all datasets
summary(base)
print("---")
summary(vis)
print("---")
summary(outcome)

# View all of them
view(base)
view(vis)
view(outcome)
```

```{R}
# Data Cleaning, Manipulation and Merging
# Ignoring NAs or missingnes for now
# First cleaning base
base = base |>
  mutate(sex = as.factor(sex))
summary(base$sex)
# So, sex = 1, M, male, Male means males and otherwise female
base_clean = base |>
  mutate(male = factor(
  ifelse(sex %in% c(1, "M", "male", "Male"), 1, 0),
  levels = c(0, 1)
)) |>
  dplyr::select(-sex) |>
  mutate(entry_date = as.Date(entry_date, format = "%d-%b-%Y")) |>
  mutate(id = as.character(id))
summary(base_clean)

# Now cleaning vis
vis = vis |>
  mutate(visit_type = as.factor(visit_type))
summary(vis$visit_type)

vis_clean = vis |>
  mutate(
    visit_type = factor(tolower(as.character(visit_type))),
    id = as.character(id),
    visit_date = as.Date(visit_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    across(starts_with("sbp"), ~ ifelse(.x <= 40, NA, .x)),
    across(starts_with("dbp"), ~ ifelse(.x <= 30, NA, .x))
  )
summary(vis_clean)

# Now cleaning outcome 
outcome = outcome |>
  mutate(exit_type = as.factor(exit_type))
summary(outcome$exit_type)

outcome_clean = outcome |>
  mutate(id = as.character(id),
    exit_date = as.Date(exit_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y"))

summary(outcome_clean)

# Joining the data!
full_data = vis_clean|>
  left_join(base_clean, by="id")|>
  left_join(outcome_clean, by="id")


full_data = full_data |>
  mutate(
    avg_sbp = rowMeans(cbind(sbp2, sbp3), na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_dbp = rowMeans(cbind(dbp2, dbp3), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

full_data = full_data |>
  mutate(
  a_med = as.integer(
      if_any(
        c(amlodipine, bisoprolol, captopril, carvedilol,
          enalapril, furosemide, hctz, lisinopril,
          losaratan, metoprolol),
        ~ coalesce(.x, 0) == 1
      ) |
      str_detect(coalesce(tolower(free_text_med), ""), "ramipril|olmesartan")
    )
)
summary(full_data)
full_data <- full_data |>
  dplyr::select(
    id, age, male, height, weight, entry_date,
    visit_date, visit_type,
    sbp1, sbp2, sbp3, avg_sbp,
    dbp1, dbp2, dbp3, avg_dbp,
    amlodipine:free_text_med,
    a_med,
    everything()
  )

write_csv(full_data, "files/full_data.csv")

summary(as.factor(full_data$free_text_med))
```

```{R}
head(full_data, 20)
```

## Incident Hypertension

```{R}
# Helper function
safe_min <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) == 0 || all(is.na(x))) return(as.Date(NA))
  min(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

# 1. Initial cleaning (ALL visits → for Part B)
table_data_B = full_data |>
  arrange(id, visit_date) |>
  mutate(
    meds = a_med,
    htn = as.integer(
    (!is.na(avg_sbp) & avg_sbp >= 130) |
    (!is.na(avg_dbp) & avg_dbp >= 80)
    ),
    htn_or_meds = as.integer(htn == 1 | meds == 1)) |>
  group_by(id) |>
  mutate(visit_number = row_number()) |>
  ungroup()

# Create clinic-only version (for Part A)
table_data_A = table_data_B |>
  filter(visit_type != "home")

# Keep only those who were disease-free at visit 1
baseline_df_ids_A = table_data_A |>
  filter(visit_number == 1, htn == 0, meds == 0) |>
  pull(id)

table_data_A = table_data_A |>
  filter(id %in% baseline_df_ids_A)

# Calculate dates and Person-Years 
event_dates_A = table_data_A |>
  arrange(id, visit_date) |>
  group_by(id) |>
  summarise(
    entry_date = min(visit_date),
    last_visit = max(visit_date),
    exit_date = first(exit_date),
    
    last_date = pmin(last_visit, exit_date, na.rm = TRUE),

    first_event_date = safe_min(visit_date[visit_number > 1 & htn_or_meds == 1]),
    second_event_date = safe_min(visit_date[visit_number > 1 & cumsum(htn_or_meds == 1) >= 2])
  ) |>
  mutate(
    py_A = as.numeric(pmin(first_event_date, last_date, na.rm = TRUE) - entry_date) / 365.25,
    py_B = as.numeric(pmin(second_event_date, last_date, na.rm = TRUE) - entry_date) / 365.25,
    event_A = as.integer(!is.na(first_event_date)),
    event_B = as.integer(!is.na(second_event_date))
  )

# Final person-level dataset (Part A)
person_df_A = table_data_A |>
  group_by(id) |>
  summarise(
    male = first(male),
    age = first(age)
  ) |>
  inner_join(event_dates_A, by = "id") |>
  mutate(
    age_group = case_when(
      age < 30 ~ "18-29 years",
      age < 40 ~ "30-39 years",
      age < 50 ~ "40-49 years",
      age < 60 ~ "50-59 years",
      TRUE ~ "60+ years"
    )
  )

# Keep only those who were disease-free at visit 1
baseline_df_ids_B = table_data_B |>
  filter(visit_number == 1, htn == 0, meds == 0) |>
  pull(id)

table_data_B = table_data_B |>
  filter(id %in% baseline_df_ids_B)

# Calculate dates and Person-Years 
event_dates_B = table_data_B |>
  arrange(id, visit_date) |>
  group_by(id) |>
  summarise(
    entry_date = min(visit_date),
    last_visit = max(visit_date),
    exit_date = unique(exit_date),
    
    last_date = pmin(last_visit, exit_date, na.rm = TRUE),

    first_event_date = safe_min(visit_date[visit_number > 1 & htn_or_meds == 1]),
    second_event_date = safe_min(visit_date[visit_number > 1 & cumsum(htn_or_meds == 1) >= 2])
  ) |>
  mutate(
    py_A = as.numeric(pmin(first_event_date, last_date, na.rm = TRUE) - entry_date) / 365.25,
    py_B = as.numeric(pmin(second_event_date, last_date, na.rm = TRUE) - entry_date) / 365.25,
    event_A = as.integer(!is.na(first_event_date)),
    event_B = as.integer(!is.na(second_event_date))
  )

# Final person-level dataset (Part B)
person_df_B = table_data_B |>
  group_by(id) |>
  summarise(
    male = first(male),
    age = first(age)
  ) |>
  inner_join(event_dates_B, by = "id") |>
  mutate(
    age_group = case_when(
      age < 30 ~ "18-29 years",
      age < 40 ~ "30-39 years",
      age < 50 ~ "40-49 years",
      age < 60 ~ "50-59 years",
      TRUE ~ "60+ years"
    )
  )
```


```{R}
make_table_kable = function(df, event_var) {
  
  # Which PY column to use?
  py_col = ifelse(event_var == "event_A", "py_A", "py_B")
  
  table_rows = list()
  
  # Total row
  n_total = nrow(df)
  e_total = sum(df[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  py_total = sum(df[[py_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  inc_total = ifelse(py_total > 0, (e_total / py_total) * 1000, NA)
  
  table_rows[[1]] = data.frame(
    Category = "**Total**",
    `Disease Free (n)` = n_total,
    `Events (n)` = e_total,
    `Person-Years` = round(py_total, 2),
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_total, 2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Sex header row
  table_rows[[2]] = data.frame(
    Category = "**Sex**",
    `Disease Free (n)` = "",
    `Events (n)` = "",
    `Person-Years` = "",
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Sex sub-rows
  for (sex in c(1,0)) {
    sub <- df[df$male == sex, ]
    py_sub <- sum(sub[[py_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    inc_sub <- ifelse(py_sub > 0, (sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE) / py_sub) * 1000, NA)
    table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
      Category = ifelse(sex == 1, "Male", "Female"),
      `Disease Free (n)` = nrow(sub),
      `Events (n)` = sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      `Person-Years` = round(py_sub, 2),
      `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_sub, 2),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Age group header row
  table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] = data.frame(
    Category = "**Age group**",
    `Disease Free (n)` = "",
    `Events (n)` = "",
    `Person-Years` = "",
    `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Age group sub-rows
  groups <- c("18-29 years","30-39 years","40-49 years","50-59 years","60+ years")
  for (g in groups) {
    sub <- df[df$age_group == g, ]
    if (nrow(sub) > 0) {
      py_sub <- sum(sub[[py_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
      inc_sub <- ifelse(py_sub > 0, (sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE) / py_sub) * 1000, NA)
      table_rows[[length(table_rows)+1]] <- data.frame(
        Category = g,
        `Disease Free (n)` = nrow(sub),
        `Events (n)` = sum(sub[[event_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
        `Person-Years` = round(py_sub, 2),
        `Incidence per 1000 PYs` = round(inc_sub, 2),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
  }
  
  # Bind all rows
  out_table = do.call(rbind, table_rows)
  
  # Column names
  colnames(out_table) = c("Category","Disease Free (n)","Events (n)","Person-Years","Incidence per 1000 PYs")
  
  out_table %>%
    kbl(caption = paste0("Incident Hypertension - ", event_var),
        escape = FALSE,  # bold markdown works
        align = "lrrrr") %>%
    kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "left", 
                  bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"))
}

# Part A table
make_table_kable(person_df_A, "event_A")

# Part B table
make_table_kable(person_df_B, "event_B")
```

## Regression

```{R}
# Baseline weight
weight_df = vis_clean |>
  filter(visit_type == "entry") |>
  dplyr::select(id, weight)
# Create BMI
bmi_data = base_clean |>
  left_join(weight_df, by = "id") |>
  mutate(height = height / 100) |> # Height to meters
  mutate(bmi = weight / (height^2)) |>
  dplyr::select(id, bmi)
```

```{R}
person_df_A = person_df_A |>
  left_join(bmi_data, by = 'id') |>
  mutate(age10 = age/10)
```

```{R, message= FALSE}
person_df_A = person_df_A |>
  mutate(
    event_A = as.integer(event_A),
    py_A = as.numeric(py_A), 
    bmi_cat = case_when(
      bmi < 18.5 ~ "Underweight",
      bmi < 25 ~ "Normal",
      bmi < 30 ~ "Overweight",
      TRUE ~ "Obese"
    )
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(event_A),
    !is.na(py_A),
    py_A > 0
  )


# Univariable models
model_age = glm(event_A ~ age10,
                offset = log(py_A),
                family = poisson(),
                data = person_df_A)

model_sex = glm(event_A ~ male,
                offset = log(py_A),
                family = poisson(),
                data = person_df_A)

model_bmi = glm(event_A ~ bmi_cat,
                offset = log(py_A),
                family = poisson(),
                data = person_df_A)

# Multivariable model
model_multi = glm(event_A ~ age10 + male + bmi_cat,
                  offset = log(py_A),
                  family = poisson(),
                  data = person_df_A)

# IRRs + CI function
get_results = function(model) {
  irr = exp(coef(model))
  ci = exp(confint(model))
  
  out = data.frame(
    Variable = names(irr),
    IRR = irr,
    CI_low = ci[,1],
    CI_high = ci[,2]
  )
  
  return(out)
}

# Build tables
tab_age = get_results(model_age)
tab_sex = get_results(model_sex)
tab_bmi = get_results(model_bmi)
tab_multi = get_results(model_multi)

tab_age %>%
  kable(digits = 3, caption = "Univariable Model: Age") |>
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

tab_sex %>%
  kable(digits = 3, caption = "Univariable Model: Sex") |>
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

tab_bmi %>%
  kable(digits = 3, caption = "Univariable Model: BMI Categories") |>
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

tab_multi %>%
  kable(digits = 3, caption = "Multivariable Model") |>
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```
